post.description: Create tags that can be attached to Knowledge Base documents to filter and organize them (improving query response accuracy).

label.description: The label/name of the KB tag.

get.description: Retrieves a list of all the Knowledge Base tags created for a project.

parameters.name: tagID
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the KB tag.

schema.description: The unique identifier of the KB tag.

get.description: Retrieves the label/name for a Knowledge Base tag by tagID.

delete.description: Deletes a specific Knowledge Base tag by tagID.

patch.description: Update the label/name of KB tags by tagID.

label.description: The label/name of the KB tag.

parameters.name: documentID
parameters.description: A unique identifier of the document object.

schema.description: A unique identifier of the document object.

post.summary: Attaches KB tags to a document.
post.description: Attaches existing KB tags to a document (documentID).

tags.description: An array of existing KB tag labels to be attached to a particular documentID.

parameters.name: documentID
parameters.description: A unique identifier of the document object.

schema.description: A unique identifier of the document object.

post.summary: Detaches KB tags from a document.
post.description: Detaches existing KB tags from a document (documentID).

tags.description: An array of attached KB tag labels to be detached from a particular documentID.

label.description: The label/name of the KB tag.

tagID.description: The unique identifier of the KB tag.

DialogManagerAPIKey.name: Authorization
DialogManagerAPIKey.description:
All requests made to any Knowledge Base APIs must be validated with a Dialog Manager API Key.

To obtain a Dialog Manager API key, go to the Integration tab on the project you uploaded data sources to and click the "Copy API key" button.
